ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the configuration was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the performance belongs to */,
  "batch" INTEGER /* Batch number for the performance entry */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f_score" REAL /* F-score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computation_times" (
  "computation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each computation time entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the computation time belongs to */,
  "computation_time_offline" REAL /* Computation time for the model in offline mode */,
  "computation_time_online" REAL /* Computation time for the model in online mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the computation times were recorded */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the computation was performed (e.g., development, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("computation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_computation_times_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the update belongs to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the update was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., model developer, data scientist, business analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
